overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a wet coastal highway at dusk. The player follows a white sports car through palm tree-lined roads, enters a brief tunnel, and emerges with a view of the Night City skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway lined with palm trees

events.description: navigating a gentle right curve on the coastal highway
steering through a left curve with rocky terrain visible on the left

agents.ego_description: following a white sports car along the wet coastal highway, maintaining steady speed through the curves

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving ahead with red taillights visible, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the coastal road
tall palm trees lining the right side of the coastal road
white sports car with illuminated red taillights driving ahead
metal guardrail with yellow reflective markers along the right shoulder
rocky hillside with sparse vegetation on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving perspective on a wet coastal highway at dusk. Palm trees line both sides of the road while the driver follows a white sports car. The vehicle navigates gentle curves with a rocky hillside visible on the left and guardrails on the right.

events.description: overtaking a red sports car on the left side of the highway
futuristic city skyline becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway and passing a red sports car on the left while approaching the city

notable_agents.action: white sports car continuing to lead ahead on the highway
red sports car being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: distant futuristic city skyline with tall glass buildings and towers
illuminated advertising signs and neon displays visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The drive continues along the coastal highway as the environment transitions from natural to urban. The driver overtakes a red sports car on the left while the white sports car remains ahead. In the distance, the glowing skyline of Night City becomes visible with neon billboards appearing on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete tunnel with overhead fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel from the coastal highway, transitioning from outdoor to enclosed space
ambient light fades completely, relying solely on artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the tunnel, following the white sports car's taillights in the enclosed concrete corridor

notable_agents.action: white sports car ahead with brake lights occasionally illuminating in the tunnel

entered.detail: rough concrete tunnel walls with yellow painted lane markings
rough concrete tunnel walls with yellow painted lane markings
overhead fluorescent tube lights lining the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete tunnel, transitioning from the open coastal road to an enclosed corridor. The natural dusk light disappears, replaced by evenly spaced fluorescent lights on the ceiling. The driver continues following the white sports car through the straight tunnel passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with prominent city skyline view

events.description: exiting the tunnel back to the open coastal highway
city skyline becomes more prominent and detailed as the vehicle approaches

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing along the coastal road with the Night City skyline clearly visible ahead

notable_agents.action: white sports car maintaining lead position as the road curves gently

entered.detail: palm trees returning to the left side of the road after the tunnel
palm trees returning to the right side of the road after the tunnel
metal guardrail with yellow markers resuming along the right shoulder

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel and returns to the open coastal highway. Palm trees reappear on both sides of the road while the guardrail resumes on the right. The Night City skyline is now clearly visible ahead, with the futuristic towers and neon lights becoming more defined as the drive continues toward the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a wet coastal highway that transitions from a natural seaside road into the neon-lit approach of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by following a white sports car through gentle curves lined with palm trees and rocky hillsides under a dim dusk sky. As the road straightens, the camera overtakes a red sports car while the glowing skyline of Night City and distant neon billboards first emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle enters a concrete tunnel, replacing the open air and natural light with a corridor of rhythmic fluorescent ceiling lamps. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel and returns to the palm-lined highway, where the futuristic towers and vibrant lights of the urban center become sharply defined ahead.
